title: Super Typhoon Haikui approaches southern Taiwan, Kaohsiung braces
content: Taiwan's Central Weather Administration issued a sea warning as Super Typhoon Haikui strengthened to Category 4 on approach to the Taiwan Strait. Kaohsiung and Keelung ports warn of 48-hour berth closures. Sustained winds of 240 km/h are expected within 72 hours of landfall.
